description: Improve the lead system after the first Exa preview run on 2026-07-06. Current behavior: LeadPreview performs Exa company searches, persists preview telemetry/candidates, dedupes/classifies candidates, and requires manual promotion. First run produced 32 candidates, 31 promotable, 1 needs enrichment, cost $0.042. Goal: inspect current implementation and make a small, high-leverage refinement that improves candidate quality/review usefulness without auto-promoting leads or creating a parallel non-Ash path.

comments.text: Refined lead preview classification/review: added source_kind metadata, treated link-in-bio/social profile hosts as third-party signals needing enrichment, removed visible bulk-promote action, and added focused ExUnit/LiveView coverage. Focused tests pass (11/11). usage_rules docs lookup was attempted but hung without output after warm compile.

title: Refine Exa lead preview and review loop
